summary: Energetic stadium show with a praised setlist and solid Jerry performance; recording quality not discussed.
review: The concert is remembered fondly by one reviewer who called the stadium vibe perfect and noted that Jerry Garcia sounded great, while other reviewers were lukewarm or left early. No technical details about the audio source or sound quality are provided, so the recording’s fidelity remains unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Mixed reviewer sentiment (one enthusiastic 5‑star, one neutral 3‑star, and one negative/0‑star) with no concrete recording information leads to a moderate overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on the audio source or clarity; no specific praise or criticism of sound quality is given.

show_quality.setlist_flow: One reviewer praised the setlist as perfect and highlighted a cool stadium vibe; other reviews gave no detail on song flow.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as looking good and sounding good by an enthusiastic attendee.
